title: Surgeon Vacancy at Hinduja Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Hinduja Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!
